normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU1_length (adj : Adj) (source : Nat) :
  (bfsShortestPath adj source).length = adj.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The returned distance table has the same length as the adjacency list.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_source_anchor (adj : Adj) (source : Nat) (hs : source < adj.length) :
  (bfsShortestPath adj source).get? source = some (some 0)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The distance from the source to itself is exactly 0 edges.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_witness_exact_edges (adj : Adj) (source v k : Nat)
  (hs : source < adj.length)
  (hk : (bfsShortestPath adj source).get? v = some (some k)) :
  ∃ p : List Nat,
    p.length = k + 1 ∧
    p.get? 0 = some source ∧
    p.get? k = some v ∧
    (∀ i : Nat, i < k →
      let u := p.get! i
      let w := p.get! (i + 1)
      w ∈ (adj.get? u).getD [])
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] = Some(k), there exists a directed path from source to v using exactly k edges.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU4_minimality (adj : Adj) (source v k : Nat)
  (hs : source < adj.length)
  (hk : (bfsShortestPath adj source).get? v = some (some k)) :
  ∀ p : List Nat,
    p.get? 0 = some source →
    p.get? (p.length - 1) = some v →
    (∀ i : Nat, i + 1 < p.length →
      let u := p.get! i
      let w := p.get! (i + 1)
      w ∈ (adj.get? u).getD []) →
    k + 1 ≤ p.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] = Some(k), no directed path from source to v uses fewer than k edges.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU5_unreachability_iff (adj : Adj) (source v : Nat) (hs : source < adj.length) :
  (bfsShortestPath adj source).get? v = some none ↔
    ¬ ∃ p : List Nat,
      p.get? 0 = some source ∧
      p.get? (p.length - 1) = some v ∧
      (∀ i : Nat, i + 1 < p.length →
        let u := p.get! i
        let w := p.get! (i + 1)
        w ∈ (adj.get? u).getD [])
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: dist[v] is None exactly when no directed path from source to v exists.
